UserPrompt.Description: The user perfectly articulates the complex business logic and workflow required.

ArchitecturePlanner.Description: The planner is forced to map the workflow into 'pages' and 'entities'. It invents a UI page for the workflow and hallucinates database tables to support it.

FrontendAIAnalyzer.Description: Maps the hallucinated APIs into React frontend services and hooks.

GenerationRouter.Description: Blindly routes the capability to a React/Node generator based purely on app mode.

FrontendGenerator (CRUD Path).Description: If the workflow (e.g., 'Risk Analysis') lacks a 1:1 matching database entity, the generator falls back to the non-entity string template, stripping all business logic and rendering a static 'Execute Action' button.

FinalOutput.Description: The final application contains a nice-looking React UI with a 'Business Logic Controller' placeholder, but zero actual workflow implementation.
